Frequently asked questions

What is AlignAI?

AlignAI is a scoring platform that rates AI tools for small businesses based on real community reviews — not vendor marketing or affiliate partnerships. We analyze 22,220+ user experiences across 27 categories to produce honest WORKED, MIXED, or FAILED verdicts on 3,908+ tools.

How does AlignAI score AI tools?

AlignAI uses a proprietary 5-Layer Community Intelligence system — not simple star ratings. Our NLP engine analyzes every review for specificity, business context, implementation depth, and sentiment. Reviews are then weighted by source credibility, recency, and detail level — so a detailed 6-month production review counts far more than a vague launch-day comment. The result is a score from 0 to 100 with a community verdict: WORKED (75+), MIXED (50–74), or FAILED (below 50), plus a confidence band showing how much data backs the score. Zero affiliate links. Zero sponsored placements. Every score is earned.

Are AI tool review sites trustworthy?

Most aren't. The majority of AI tool review sites are funded by affiliate commissions or sponsored placements — the tools ranked highest are often the ones that pay the most, not the ones that work best. AlignAI was built to solve this by scoring tools exclusively on real community feedback with full methodology transparency.

What's the best AI tool for my small business?

It depends on your business type, team size, and specific needs. AlignAI scores 3,908+ tools across 27 categories so you can find the right fit based on what real users in similar businesses actually experienced.

Is AlignAI free?

AlignAI is completely free during our launch period. Browse tools, read community verdicts, search by category, compare tools, and save to your stack — all at no cost.

How is AlignAI different from G2 or Capterra?

G2 and Capterra accept vendor payments for premium placements and sponsored rankings. AlignAI has zero sponsored placements and zero affiliate links. We focus specifically on small businesses and score tools using a proprietary 5-Layer Community Intelligence system and transparent methodology — not vendor-submitted reviews.

We're putting the finishing touches on 3,908 scored tools across 27 categories.

Get in early.

Be first to access AlignAI when we launch — plus get a weekly digest of top-scored tools and new community reviews. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
